newsSince: No new material news since June 9. The driver remains the Q1 2026 trading update (order intake £79.1M, +48% cc; book-to-bill 1.53x; full-year guidance maintained), already digested. Stock +11.8% since prior refresh on continued semicap-recovery momentum.

sources.label: XP Power Q1 orders surge / 2026 outlook (TipRanks)

verdicts.rankRationale: Latent power/component node: turnaround thesis intact but nothing new since June 9 - the +48% orders / 1.53x book-to-bill Q1 update is already priced, and the +12% move is momentum/re-rating, not fresh evidence. Hold; semicap recovery still supports the case.
verdicts.bull: 48% order surge and 1.53x book-to-bill signal semicap-driven demand inflection.
verdicts.neutral: Recovery real but +115% YTD already trusts it; awaiting interim confirmation.
verdicts.bear: China site closure/Vietnam transition risk; small $0.7B cap; momentum-driven move.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Semicap equipment recovery; interim results / margin rebuild
verdicts.primaryRisk: Order normalization off Q1 peak; transition execution
